/CAL: SHERIFF WARRANT DISCHARGE/NP/X: DEFENDANT IN SAFETY CELL/CTORD: SHERIFF'S WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERREDTO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/SHER/BAIL: 10,000/X:WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X: THE COURT CONFIRMS THE PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/
